summary: Poorly preserved first‑generation tape with right‑channel EQ loss makes the listening experience subpar despite taper effort.
review: The recording suffers from age‑related corrosion, causing noticeable loss of EQ and presence in the right channel. While the tapers’ dedication is appreciated, the degraded tape limits enjoyment, especially at higher volumes; no performance details are provided to offset the technical shortcomings.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one low‑star review highlights serious tape degradation and channel imbalance, leading to a poor overall impression.

recording_quality.technical_notes: First‑generation tape shows corrosion; right channel loses EQ and presence, resulting in an imbalanced, muffled sound.
